label: 1539 CE
era_summary: Year 1539 (MDXXXIX) was a common year starting on Wednesday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1539: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563; Turkey, Algiers-Venice, 1537-39. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).

andalusia_iberia.summary: Active conflicts in 1539: Algiers-Spain,Italy (Tunis), 1534-1563; Spain-Yucatan, 1539; Spain (Ghent), 1539-40. Maddison records GDP/capita 1291 (ESP, 1539) — used as the economy proxy for the whole region. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
